positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos_conjecture.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u9,axiom,
    is_sporting_event(summer_olympic_games)).

cnf(u10,negated_conjecture,
    ~is_sporting_event(world_championships)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define was_in(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define won_most_medals(X0,X1) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for neg_conjecture.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define is_sporting_event(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define was_in(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define won_most_medals(X0,X1) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
